title: ECSS Verification Suite — Structural Inheritance and ECSS Builder Papers
description: Companion verification code and two journal papers from Bo Cao's PhD thesis: (1) Structural Inheritance in Sensitivity Systems of DAEs — proves that adding sensitivity equations preserves Σ-matrix, offsets, and Jacobian identically; (2) Automatic Generation of Sensitivity Systems for DAEs via MVTS — presents the ECSS builder using operator-overloading AD. Includes Python verification suite for all structural inheritance claims across 10 test systems (indices 0–5).
